title: Khawzawlah Chapchar Kut 2026 ropui taka hman a ni.
content:
4830/2025-2026

Dated Khawzawl, 13th March, 2026 :Mizo te’n kut kan neih zinga kan ngaihhlut ber te zing ami Chapchar Kut chu vawiin khan Khawzawl Field No. 1 ah hman niin, Champhai North bialtu MLA leh Adviser to Chief Minister (Technical) ni bawk Er. H. Ginzalala chu Kut Pa niin a hmanpui a, Kut Thlengtu chu Sub-Headquarters YMA President Pu PC Rosiama niin “Zo Nun Ze Mawi – Inremna” tih thupui hman a ni.

Kut Pa, Er. H. Ginzalala chuan thu sawiin Khawzawl District-in Chapchar Kut hmang tura an sawm chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin chibai a buk a, pi pu te’n hlim taka an lo hman thin Chapchar Kut chu induhsakna, inhmangaihna leh inthianthatna lantirna hun a nih angin Mizo history-ah a pawimawh em em a, inremna atan leh hun hlimawm taka hmanna hun a nih thu a sawi. He kut hi Mizo hnam tana a hlut em avangin Zo hnahthlak zawng zawng te’n zau zawk leh ropui zawka hman a nih theih nan sorkarin theihtawp a chhuah thu a sawi a, ram dang atang pawhin Zo hnahthlak unau te pawhin he kut hmang tur hian an lo kal thin thu leh Sorkar pawhin theihtawp a chhuah zel tur thu a sawi. Thangthar te’n a hlut zia hre zel turin leh kan Kristian-na nen a inthlunzawm tlat a nih zia hriaa chhawm nung zel turin a sawm a ni.

Kut Thlengtu Pu PC Rosiama chuan inlawmna thu sawiin Kumin thupui ‘ Zo nun ze mawi- inremna’ in a tarlan angin vawiina lo kal khawmte leh Khawzawl District hmun hrang hrang a Chapchar Kut hmangte karah inremna a awm theih ngei a beisei thu a sawi. Addl. DC, Pu K. Zorammuana’n lawmthusawina hun a nei bawk.

Chapchar Kut 2026 lawmna hi nimin, ni 12 atanga hman tan tawh niin, Concert te lo neih tawh a ni a, Zaithiam lar hmun hrang hrang atangin an rawn tel a, vawiin hian Khawzawl District chhunga YMA branch hrang hrang atangin hnam lam chi hrang hrang entir a ni a, heng bakah hian Miss Zirsangpuii, Miss Mizoram 2020 team te atangin item hrang hrang entir a ni bawk a, Chapchar Kut 2026 pual hian Khawzawl District, Miss Chapchar Kut   thlan chhuah niin Miss Chapchar Kut atan Ida Malsawmtluangi d/o Eliza Lalhmingthanga Sailo, Khawzawl Vengthar Branch chu tlan a ni a, 1st Runner up- Lalrinchhani d/o Lalchawiliana, Khawzawl Darngawn Branch leh 2nd Runner up - Lalsawmzuali d/o Vanlalsawma(L), Biate Branch te thlan chhuah an ni a, heng bakah hian naupang thuammawi te thlanna neih bawk niin lawmman pawisafai leh Citatation hlan a ni bawk. Tin, zan lamah pawh programme hlimawm tak hman chhunzawm tum a ni.

title: Lungleiah hlung leh hlawhtling takin Chapchar Kut 2026 hman a ni
content:
4829/2025-2026

Lunglei, 2026 Vau thla ni 13:Vawiin March ni 13, 2026 (Zirtawpni) khan Chapchar Kut chu Lungleia C. Ṭhuamluaia Mualah hlung taka hman a ni a. Lunglei High Powered Committee (HPC) Vice Chairman Pu V. Malsawmtluanga chu Kut Pa niin, Lunglei District Bawrhsap Pi Navneet Mann chu Kut Thlengtu a ni.

Kut Pa Pu V. Malsawmtluanga chuan kut hmang tura kal khawmte leh Lunglei District mipuite Chapchar Kut chibai bukin, Chapchar Kut chu inrem, hlim leh lungrual taka khawtlang mipui zawng zawngin an hman ho ṭhin a nih angin, a awmze ril tak ngaihtuah chunga hlim taka hmang turin mipuite a sawm a. Pi leh pute hunah ziaka thil chhinchhiah thlap thlap a awm loh avangin Mizo chanchin leh thil hluite duhthusama hriat kim theih a ni lo va, hei vang hian Mizoram sawrkar chuan ṭhangtharte'n kan history kimchang zawk kan hriat chian theih nan Chief Minister kaihhruaina hnuaiah "Hnam Ṭobul Zawn Chhuah Committee" a din tih sawiin, sawrkar chuan Mizo thil hlui chhui chhuah bakah, hnam ziarang, nunphung leh tih dante humhalh, chawi san leh tihhmasawn kawngah theih tawpin hma a la chho mek tih a sawi a. Sazaikawnah District Museum Lunglei building thar ṭha tak hawn thar a nih thu sawiin, he Museum-a thawktu mamawhna phuhru turin kumin chhungin Curator, Museum Guide, Museum Assistant, Clerical Staff leh IV Grade post eng emaw zat siam turin dil leh bawhzui mek a nih thu te, ram dang mi khualzin Mizoram tlawhtu pung zel chu kawng hrang hranga ei zawnna remchang thlentu tur a nih avangin he lama ei zawnna bul ṭan tumte tan sawrkarin Bana Kaih (Handholding) Scheme leh scheme hrang hmangin loan a pek chhuah bakah, tourism hmasawnna tura hma a lak mek zel thu a sawi a. Ram dang mite'n kan hnam tih dan a taka an hmuh theih nan leh khualzin hip nan Inrinni tin Falkawnah "Living Museum" buatsaih ṭhin a nih thu sawiin, hei hi ṭhalaite leh naupang zawkte'n tlawh tamin, hnam ziarang leh nunphung hriat thar deuh deuh nan hmang se a duh thu a sawi.

Kut Pa chuan Mizo pi leh pute'n nun ze mawi tak vawng tlat a, induhsak leh mi pawi sawi hlau tak, mi dang nen inrem loh palh hlauva thu khuh taka ṭawngkau an chhep ṭhin te chu hre thar a, inṭhenawm khawvennaah te, ei zawnna hmunah leh ni tin nunah chhawm zel turin kal khawmte a chah a. Chapchar Kut chu pi pute hman anga hnam thil leh nun ze mawi chawi sanna leh zir tharna ni atan leh rilru leh taksa hahdamna ni atan hmang turin duhsakna a hlan a. Zo nun ze mawi chu khualzinte hmuh chak, hnam ro thil hlu tak a nih avangin vawn him a, chhawm nun zel a pawimawh thu sawiin, Zo nun ze mawi — inremna, tlawmngaihna, induhsakna leh ai upa zahna te chu uar lehzuala chhungkua leh khawtlangah inzirtir a, ram dang leh hnam dang mit hmuha nunpui leh tar lang zel turin ram mipuite a sawm a ni.

Kut Thlengtu Pi Navneet Mann chuan Mizo ṭawngin inlawmna thu sawiin, Chapchar Kut hmang tura kal khawm zawng zawngte kut chibai a buk rualin duhsakna a hlan a. India rama hnam, chi, ṭawng leh sakhua chi hrang hrangte chu inrem taka awm ho tur kan nih thu sawiin, kan inan lohna hriat thiam a, inzah tawn chu inremna a nih thu a sawi a. Ram hmasawn nan inremna a pawimawh thu sawiin, ram dang, hnam dang, sakhaw dang, veng dang, kohhran dang, pawl dang, chhungkaw dang leh mi dang nen inrem tawn a, ramngaw, nungcha, lei, tui, boruak leh kan chenna khawvel leh mahni taksa nen ngei pawh inremna siam zel turin kal khawmte a chah a. Mizo hnam thuam mawi tak te, zai leh lam mawi tak te, Mizo ṭawng leh nunphung te chu humhalh a, chhawm nung zel tur leh Zo nun ze mawi — Inremna nunpui zel turin kut hmangtute a chah.

Lungleia Chapchar Kut lawmna hun hi Lunglei Sub-Headquarters Young Mizo Association (YMA) Vice President Pu CMS Dawngliana'n a kaihruai a. Mizoram United Pentecostal Church (UPC) Southern Zone Secretary Rev. Gospelthanga'n hunserh hmangin, Lunglei Sub-Headquarters YMA Zaipawl te'n hawnna hla, "Ro min relsak ang che" tih an rem a. Mizo Upa Pawl (MUP) General Headquarters Lunglei te'n hlado chhamin, tlang an tlir a. Sub-Headquarters YMA Cultural Troupe te kaihhruaiin YMA branch 19 (bu 23 ) te'n a huhovin Cheraw (Buh-za-aih) an kan a. Organising Committee Secretary, Sub-Headquarters YMA Secretary Pu Zothanzuala Hnamte chuan lawm thu a sawi a. Kangmei Ven Chawlhkar (Fire Prevention Week) 2026 puala Lunglei District Committee on Fire Prevention (DLCFP) buatsaih lem che (reels) insiamsiak lawmman sem nghal niin, pakhatna Hmingchungnunga (Electric Veng, Lunglei), pahnihna Israel Lalhriatkima (Salem Veng, Lunglei) leh pathumna HC Vanlalawmpuia (Farm Veng, Lunglei) te an ni.

Pu Lalbiakdika leh Nl. KC Lalthanzuali te kaihhruaiin Chapchar Kut lawmna hun hnihna (Hnam Pual) hman chhunzawm a ni a. Mizo Hmeichhe Insuihkhawm Pawl (MHIP) Sub-Headquarters Lunglei te'n Chhepchher lam entirin, Mizo Cultural Artistes' Association (MCAA), Sub-Headquarters Lunglei te'n Solakia an entir a. Zobawm MCO Salem te'n Sakei lu lam entirin, MCAA SHQ Lunglei kaihhruaiin YMA branch 18-in Tlanglam entirin, Sub-Headquarters YMA Cultural Troupe-in Khuallam an entir bawk a. Mizo Cultural Organisation (MCO) General Headquarters Lunglei leh MCO branch 10 te'n chai entirin, mipui chaia chhunzawm a ni.

Chapchar Kut zai rimawi hunpui (concert) buatsaih chhunzawm niin, zaithiam hrang hrang — Lalsangliana (Taitea), Ruatpuii, Becky Fanai, Chama Thangluah, F. Zomuanpuia, Feli Hauhnar, H. Rosangliana, Lalenkawli Pautu, R. Lalhmangaiha, R. Lalvensanga leh Vanrammawii Pautu te'n zaiin kal khawmte an awi a. Chapchar Kut 2026 House Band te'n zai hi an rem a ni.

Lungleia Chapchar Kut lawmnaah hian department hrang hrang — District Rural Development Office (Mizoram State Rural Livelihoods Mission), Agriculture & Farmers Welfare, Horticulture, Commerce & Industries, Khadi & Village Industries leh Lungsen BDO (MzSRLM) bakah, an hnuaia Self Help Group (SHG), kut hna thawktu leh thil siam chhuaktute'n an thil thar chhuah leh siam chhuahte pho chhuakin, kut hmannaa kalte mamawh leh duh zawng lei theihna tur dawr (stall) hrang hrang 27 hawn a nih bakah, naupang intihhlimna hmun (Kids Zone) buatsaih a ni bawk.

Organising Committee-in Chapchar Kut Lanu leh Kut Hraite (Hmeichhia leh Mipa) 2026 thlan chu Lunglei Photographers' Association (LPA) kuta a dah angin, Chapchar Kut hmannaa hnam thuam inbela kal nula leh naupang aṭangin Kut Lanu leh Kut Hraite hi thlan a ni a. Lunglei Chapchar Kut Lanu 2026-ah Jenny Malsawmtluangi (Chanmari) chu thlan a ni a. Kut Hraite (Hmeichhia)-ah Zomuansangi Tochhawng (Lunglawn) leh Kut Hraite (Mipa)-ah S. Malsawmkima (Venghlun) te thlan an ni bawk.

Lungleia Chapchar Kut hlawhtling taka hman a nih theih nana tha leh zung sengtu zawng zawng chungah Kut Organising Committee chuan lawm thu a sawi.

title: Lunglei South MLA Pu Lalramliana Papuia'n Chawngteah Chapchar Kut a hmanpui
content:
4828/2025-2026

Lunglei, 2026 Vau thla ni 13:Vawiin khan Chawngte Khelmualah Young Mizo Association (YMA) Chawngte Group huaihawtin Chapchar Kut hman a ni a. Lunglei South bialtu MLA Pu Lalramliana Papuia chu Kut Pa niin, Chawngte Sub-Divisional Officer (Civil) Pu Lalnunpuia Renthlei chu Kut Thlengtu a ni.

Kut Pa Pu Lalramliana Papuia chuan kut hmangtute Chapchar Kut chibai bukin duhsakna a hlan a. Mizo hnam kengtu chu Mizo mipate an nih angin, hnam nun tizahawm a, timawi tur leh hnam ral loh nana mawhphurtu lian zawk pawh mipate an nih thu sawiin, Mizo mipate chu ram leh hnam innghahna tlak ni tura ṭan la turin a chah a. Chapchar Kut thupui chu "Zo nun ze mawi — Inremna" tih a nih angin, Mizoram chhunga hnam dang chengte nen pawh inrem taka nun ho a pawimawh tih sawiin, hetih lai hian Mizo hnam bil tana ruahman thilte erawh hnam dang nena inzen ṭawm rem lo chin a awm tih hriat thiam a ngai a, Mizo anga hamṭhatna kan neihte hnam dangin min chuhpui a thiang lo, a ti.

Kut Pa chuan Mizo pi leh pute chu mahni intodelh tuma taima taka hna thawk ṭhin leh an thawh rah ngei ei ṭhin, ṭhenawmte nena inrem taka awm hram hram tum ṭhin an nih thu sawiin, pi pute'n an lo nunpui hnam nun ze mawi tak chu ṭhangtharte'n chhawm nun zel a pawimawh thu a sawi a. Hnam lam leh incheina hmang chauhva Mizo zia lantir tum lovin, Mizo nun zia chu nun chhuahpui zawk tur a nih thu sawiin, Zo nun ze mawi — Inremna leh nun ze mawi dangte chhawm nung zel turin kal khawmte a chah.

Vawiina Chawngtea Chapchar Kut hmanah hian Kut Thlengtu Pu Lalnunpuia Renthlei chuan thuhma sawiin, Chakma Mission Director Rev. Dr C. Lalruatthanga'n hunserh a hmang a. Organising Committee Chairman Pu ZD Ramngamzaua'n inlawmna thu sawiin, YMA, MHIP leh MUP te'n hnam lam chi hrang hrang — Cheraw, Chheih lam, Chawnglaizawn leh Sarlamkai bakah, hlado chham, hnam zia pho lanna leh hman lai Mizo nun lantirna lemchan te an entir a. YMA Chhang te'n pawnto entirin, zaithiam hrang hrang — J. Lalrosanga, Siampuii Ralte, Thangromawia leh Youngfella bakah, tualchhung zaithiamte zai ngaihthlak a ni bawk.

title: Thenzawlah Pu Lalnghingloa Hmar hovin Chapchar Kut ropui taka lawm a ni
content:
4827/2025-2026

Dated Serchhip, the 13th March, 2026:Vantawng Group YMA huaihawt in vawiin chawhma dar 11 atang khan Thenzawla Lothazawl ah Chapchar Kut 2026  chu 'Aia upa te zah thiamin, an thu te awihin zawm fo rawh' tih thupuia hmangin ropui taka hman a ni a. He hun hi Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar Minister of State, Sport & Youth Serviced/Tourism/Excise & Narcotics/LESDE Department chuan 'Kut Pa' niin a hmanpui.

Vawiina Lothazawl Thenzawla Chapchar Kut 2026 'Kut Pa' Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar hian thu sawiin, Pathian in hnam tin a hrang theuh in min din a, kan awmna hmun tur theuh min pe bawk, hnam hrang hrang te chuan Kut hrang hrang kan nei a, Mizo ten kut kan neih zinga lawm hlawh ber leh kan nghaihhlut ber chu Chapchar Kut hi a ni a ti. Kut thupui 'Aia upa te zah thiamin, an thu te awihin zawm fo rawh' tih anih angin thuawihna a keng tel a ni a ti a, Mizoten tun hnaia kan tlakchham tak thuawihna hi chhungkua a kan chenhona ah te, kan hnathawhna ah te kan thupui hian min zirtir nawn leh se a duh thu a sawi.

Chief Minister bial Thenzawla Peace City din tur chungchang pawh sawiin ruahmanna thui tak a kal tawh thu a sawi a; Tourism Department hnuaia hmalakna pawh sawilang in, Ministry Of Tourism hnuaiah 'Model Tourist Destination' atan Thenzawl khua chu thlan a nih thu hmalakna kalpui mek a nih thu a sawi, Ministry lamain Project an pawm a nih chuan Tourism Project lian tham tak Thenzawl ah kalpui a nih tur thu te, Ministry of DoNER hnuai ah Lengpui Aizawl Thenzawl Model circuit ruahman mek anih thu te, Vantawng khawhthla enna tur leh a chhehvel a infrastructure dinna turin cheng Vbc. 35 (Nuaih sangthum zanga) pawisa dawn anih tawh thu leh bul tan thuai tum anih thu a sawi bawk. A sawizelna ah Irrigation leh Water Resources-te nen tangkawpin Vantawng Tuirihiau Integrated Water Conservation and Eco Tourism Project siam a ni a, hemi atan hian cheng Vbc 9 nuaih 84 dawn tawh a nih thu a sawi bawk a, Thenzawl a Golf Course thuamthatna tur PM Devine hnuaiah thahnem tak duan niin DPR thehluh tawh a ni a Ministry of DoNER in an endik mek a, an pawm anih chuan Golf Course chu a lian zawk leh changtlung zawk a siam a nih tur thu a sawi bawk. Heng bakah hian CSR Project atangin Thenzawl ah Home Stay 10 din anih tur thu leh Thenzawla Tourist Lodge sak thatna tur pawisa dawn a nih thu a sawi bawk.

Vawiina Chapchar Kut hmanna hmun Lothazawla phullem phahna tur pawisa a awm tawh thu te, tender chhuah a nih tawh thu leh contractor pawh thlan an nih thu sawiin kumin April thla ah chuan phullem phah hna tan a ni dawn tih a sawi bawk.

Thenzawl chu Handloom khawpui a ni a, Mizoram hmun dangah chuan Thenzawl puan tah an bih mek lain Thenzawl khua chuan mahni deuh chhuah nge in bih thei a, a ropui tiin tradition chhawm nung tu, eizawnna tlak a chawinung tu khua an ni chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi bawk a; Kut lawmpui nan Organising Chairman Pu C. Lalnunthara thilpek a hlan bawk.

Vawiina Thenzawl a Chapchar Kut 2026 hmanna ah hian Kut thlengtu chu Pu C. lalnunthara, President Vantawng Group YMA a ni a, Thenzawl Cultural Club, MCO Branch bakah Vantawng Group YMA hnuaia Branch YMA hrang hrang ten hnam lam chi hrang hrang an entir bakah zaithiam te hnen atang malzai ngaihthlak a ni a, Chapchar Kut Miss leh Naupang thuam nalh/Mizo thuam inhmeh te thlan an ni bawk.

title: HOME MINISTER- IN RESIDENTIAL SCHOOL LAWNGTLAI, SADBHAV MANDAP CHAWNHU,  GIRLS' HOSTEL LAWNGTLAI LEH CHAWNGTE TE HAWNG
content:
4826/2025-2026

Lawngtlai, 13th March 2026 :Vawiin khan Home Minister Pu K. Sapdanga chuan Khuallian niin Residential School, Lawngtlai, Sadbhav Mandal Chawnhu, Girls' Hostel, Lawngtlai leh Chawngte te chu a rualin Residential School,College Veng, Lawngtlaiah a hawng a. Dr. Lorrain Lalpekliana Chinzah Adviser to Chief Minister leh Lawngtlai East bialtu MLA nibawk, leh Pu C. Ngunlianchunga, Lawngtlai West bialtu MLA te chuan khualzahawm nia hmanpuiin, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga, Lawngtlai Bawrhsap chuan hun a kaihruai.

Pu K. Sapdanga chuan Lawngtlai District mipuite leh a mamawhtuten tangkai leh hlawk taka an hman tura Residential School, Lawngtlai, Sadbhav Mandal Chawnhu leh Girls' Hostel, Lawngtlai leh Chawngte te chu a hawn thu a sawi a. Hmasawnna ruhrel tha tak tak hawnte tangkai tak hmang turin Lawngtlai mipuite a çhah a. Mizoram Sawrkarin LLADC kutah phal taka a pek thu tarlangin, a enkawl kawngah thahnem ngai taka thawk turin a chah a ni. Residential School chuan infiammite tan chona thar a pek ngei a beisei tih sawiin, eizawnna tlaka hman a nih a beisei thu a tarlang a ni.

Khuallian chuan thalaiten tih takzet leh rualelna nei chunga ke an pen a hun tawh hle tih a sawi a. Mizoram tihmingthatu ni turin thalaite an pawimawh hle a, eng hna pawh thawk ila, rinawmna leh taihmakna nen neih fan fan a hun tawh hle nia ahriat thu a sawi. Chhim lam chu Mizoram kawtchhuah a ni tan mek tih tarlangin, hemi kawngah pawh lo inbuatsaih that a tul hle a, a bik takin Lawngtlai mipuiten tih tur an ngai hle a, theihtawp chhuah turin a fuih a ni. Ram leh hnamah chian a pawimawh hle tih tarlangin, hnam ziarâng chawikan kawngah I harh thar ang u tiin a sawm a. LADC- ah sawrkar ngelnghet tak a awm a pawimawh hle a, chu chu mipuite duhdan pawh a ni tiin, chak taka LADC kal zel a beisei thu a sawi a, Mizoram sawrkar nen chak zawka thawk tlang zel turin duhsakna a hlan nghal bawk.

Khualzahawm Dr. Lorrain Lalpekliana Chinzah, Adviser to Chief Minister chuan Lawngtlai District - mipuite tana hmasawnna ruhrel lian tak peihfel a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. A hman tangkai leh enkawl kawngah erawh rilru sen a ngai dawn hle a, Duat leh uluk taka enkawl leh hman tangkai a tul dawn hle a ni, a ti. LADC hotute mawhphurhna pawh a sang dawn hle tih tarlangin, theihtawp chhuahho turin LADC, VC leh NGO te a sawm a ni. Residential School chuan Infiammite tan bungthar a thleng tur thu sawiin, Girl's Hostel leh Sadbhav Mandal te pawhin rah tha a chhuah ngei a beisei tih a sawi.

Khualzahawm Pu C. Ngunlianchunga, Lawngtlai West bialtu MLA chuan a bial chhunga hmasawnna ruhrel tha tak a awm chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. LADC ngeiin a enkawl chhunzawm tir chu ropui a tih thu tarlangin, tha leh uluk taka enkawl a pawimawh hle a ni, a ti. Neitu thinlung put pawimawhna sawiin, MLA chuan Lawngtlai mipuite neitu diktak an nihna hriaa duat taka enkawl turin a sawm a ni.

Pu C. Lalsawmzuala, CEM, LADC, chuan Residential School, Lawngtlai, LADC kutah hlan a ni chu ropui a tih thu sawiin, Mizoram Sawrkar leh Mizoram State Sports Council chungah lawmthu a sawi a. Lawngtlai mipuite an ngaihven kawngah hlu a tih thu tarlangin, Laifate tan ni chhinchhiah tlak tak a ni, a ti a. A enkawl kawngah LADC chuan theihtawp a chhuah tur thu a sawi a ni.

Pu James Lalramnghaka, Asst. Engineer, Mizoram State Sports Council chuan Technical Report a pe a. Residential School, Lawngtlai hi Ministry of Minority Affairs hnuaia PMJVK Scheme 2019- 2020 atanga cheng nuai 3461.70 hmuh niin Work order amount chu Rs. 3149.84 lakhs a ni a.Contractor hi DJ Consultancy Services, Mission Veng, Aizawl, Decor Ondia, Guwahati, Assam te niin, ni 8, March 2021 khan hnathawh tan niin, ni 8, September 2025 khan zawhfel a ni. Residential School ah hian Academic Building, Boy's Hostel, Girl's Hostel, Principal Quarter, Teachers/ Staff quarter, Multipurpose Hall, Artificial Turf Football Ground - te a awm a ni. Sadbhav Mandap, Lawngtlai sak nan hian Ministry of Minority Affairs hnuaia PMJVK Scheme 2018- 2019 atangin cheng nuai 236.0O hmuh niin Work order amount chu Rs. 214.74 lakhs a ni a, M/s Excell Consultancy Services, Mission Veng, Aizawl ten hna an thawk a ni. Hna hi ni 19, December 2021 khan tan niin, ni 15, February, 2024 khan zawhfel a ni. Girl's Hostel Lawngtlai, sak nan hian Ministry of Minority Affairs hnuaia PMJVK Scheme 2019- 2020 atanga cheng nuai 3461.70 hmuh niin Work order amount hi Rs. 257.32 lakhs a ni a. Ni 22, July 2022 khan hnathawh tan niin, Ni 30,November 2025 khan zawhfel a ni. Girl's Hostel, Chawngte work amount Rs. 257.32 lakhs niin, M/s Excell Consultancy Services, Mission Veng, Aizawl ten an thawk a. Ni 21, July 2022 khan hna tan niin, ni 30, January 2026 khan zawk fel a ni.

Home Minister hian Residential School chu LADC hnenah hlan nghalin, Girl's Hostel Lawngtlai, hi Govt. Lawngtlai College hnenah hlan a ni a, Girl's Hostel Chawngte chu Govt. Chawngte College hnenah hlan niin Sadbhav Mandap chu 'Management Board' kutah hlan a ni bawk.

Vawiin hun hmannah hian Mizoram sawrkar leh LADC Official - te, Sports Discipline hrang hrang hruaitute an tel tha hle a, Pu K. Lalthanzara, Executive Secretary, LADC chuan lawmthu sawina neiin hun a khar.

title: LAWNGTLAIAH ROPUI LEH URHSUN TAKIN CHAPCHAR KÛT HMAN A NI
content:
4825/2025-2026

Lawngtlai, 13th March 2026: Vawiin khan DC pisa tualah mizote  kût  ropui tak Chapchar Kût chu urhsûn takin  hman a ni a. He hunah hian Pu K. Sapdanga, Home Minister chu Kût Pa niin, Dr. Lorrain Lalpekliana Chinzah,  Adviser to Chief Minister chu Kût Uaptu niin Lawngtlai Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chu Kût thlengtu a ni.

Kût Pa chuan Lawngtlai mipui kalkhawmte Chapchar Kût chibai  bukna  a nei hmasa a. Kût thupui Zo nun ze mawi- Inremna a taka tihlawhtlingtu ni tura  sawmin, Zofate tana ni hlu tak, hnam ziarâng tarlanna hun pawimawh tak a nih angin, hlim taka hman a tul hle a ti a. Thlahtute chin thin hlut thiam hi thang leh tharte mawh a ni tih hriaa  uar zawka Chapchar Kût hman zel a tul hle a ni, a ti. Ram leh hnam hmasawnna turin hnam ziarâng chawisan zel a pawimawh hle tih tarlangin, Pi leh Puten an hlut ang taka hlut thiam a tul thu a sawi a. A bik takin Lawngtlai District- chu  zohnahthlak hnam  chi hrang hrang chenna a nih angin, inlungrual  leh inrem taka awm turin a sawm a ni. Laifate chu Mizoram hmasawnna tura theihtawp chhuah thin an nih tawh thin thu sawiin, Laifate Mizoram tana thawk zel turin a fuih a ni.

Pu K. Sapdanga chuan ram politics  siam tha turin mi tinin mawhphurhna an neih vek thu sawiin, inthiarfihlim lo a, a siamthatu ni theuh turin a sawm a. YLA - ten theihtawp an chhuah thinna  fakawm a tih thu sawiin, Ruihhlo do leh khawtlang enkawl kawngah tha thlah lo turin a chah a. Thangthar zawkte tana chhenfakawm khawtlang siam tura thahnemngaih a tul thu sawiin, mahni mawha la theuh turin Lawngtlai mipuite a fuih a ni. Chhim lam chu Mizoram kawtchhuah a ni mai dawn tih sawiin, sawrkar, VC, NGO leh Kohhran te tanho thiam a tul hle a, a tha zawnga hman tum turin a chah a. Pu K. Sapdanga chuan Chapchar Kut hian hlimna chauh minpe lo se, tlawmgnaihna, lungrualna leh inunaina thar mi pe se tiin, Lawngtlai District- mipuite Kût  duhsakna a hlan nghal bawk.

Kût Uaptu Dr. Lorrain Lalpekliana Chinzah chuan Chapchar Kût chu hnam ziarâng tarlanna pawimawh tak a ni tiin ram leh hnam humhalhna pawimawh tak a ni, a ti a. Khawvel changkang zelin khawtlangah  nghawng nasa tak a nei a, hetij rual hian mahni hnam chin dan te vawn nun zel a pawimawh hle a ti. Ram leh khawtlangah inremna awm turin zo nun zemawi chawisan a hun hle a, i chhawmning zel ang u tiin a sawm a ni. Dr. Lorrain Lalpekliana Chinzah chuan Ruihhlo do kawngah theihtawp chhuah a hun tak zet tih tarlangin, sawrkar leh VC,NGO leh mipuite theihtawp chhuahho a tul hle a, thawkho zel turin a chah a ni. Kût Uaptu chuan ram leh hnam hmasawn zelna turin Inremna i vawng nung zel ang u tiin Lawngtlai mipuite a sawm a ni.

Kût thlentu Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan lawmna thu sawiin, Kût Pa, Kût Uaptu leh  Kût hmang tura lo kal Lawngtlai mipuite chungah lawmthu a sawi a. Chapchar Kût thupui Zo nun ze mawi- Inremna chu a taka nunpui a pawimawh hle tih tarlangin, rilruah inremna nei turin a fuih a. Zonun ze mawi vawng nunga chawi kang zel turin mi tinin theihtawp chhuah a tul tih sawiin, tlawmgnaihna, inremna, induhsakna leh injmangaihnate a taka nunpui turin kalkhawmte a sawm a ni.

Vawiin Chapchar Kût hmannaah hian hnam lam chi hrang hrang, Costume parade - te entir niin, zai ngaihthlak a ni a, Miss Chapchar Kût, Little Miss leh Little Mister - te thlan nghal a ni a. Lawmman dawngtute chu

Miss Chapchar Kût - Esther C. Lalremruati, L- III

Little Miss- Lizia Vanlalngaihhlui Sathing, Electric Veng

Little Mister- Immanuel Lalvenhima, AOC

Chapchar Kût hmannah hian  Official leh Lawngtlai mipuite an tel kim tha hle a, Pi Margaret J. Vanlalremmawii, SDO (S) chuan lawmthu sawina neiin hun a khar.

title: SIAHA VAI HPI FIELD-AH CHAPCHAR KUT ROPUI TAKA HMAN A NI
content:
4824/2025-2026

Dated Siaha, the 13 March, 2026:Vawiin khân Siaha Vaihpi Field, Siahaah Mizote kut ropui bêr Chapchar Kût hman a ni a, mipuiin an hlut hle. Kût Pa hi Pu VL. Hruaizela Khiangte, district bawrhsap niin Kût thlengtu hi Pu N. Viakhu, Chairman, MADC a ni.

Kut thlengtu Pu N. Viakhu chuan kumin Kût thupuiah 'Zonun Ze Mawi Inremna' a ni tih sawiin Kût hmangtu zawng zawngte chu hlim leh inrem tâka hun hmang tûrin duhsakna a hlan.

Thu sawiin Kût Pa Pu VL. Hruaizela Khiangte, district bawrhsap nibawk chuan, 'Khawvela hlu bêr chu inremna a ni hial awm e, inrem theih lohna hian harsatna a siam a; indona hial a thlen ṭhin' a ti. Chapchar Kût chu inremna ni, tihtauh leh innghirngho rem lohna nì a ni angin chhungkua inrem ila, chumi aṭang chuan ram leh hnam siamṭhat hna thawk chhunzawm thei tûrin thlamuang takin rilru a sen theih tawh ṭhin a ni, a tibawk. Mizote chu hnam tlêmte kan nih avangin inrem leh inlungrual taka zaikhata luangza tur kan nih thu Kût Pa hian sawiin, 'Hnam hrang hrang awmkhawm hi Mizo kan ni a, kei chu chumi hnam chu ka ni tia inlahrang tham kan awm lo,' a ti. Faina leh Ruihhlo do chungchang Kût Pa hian sawi bawkin, ṭhalaite hi tun ang renga ruihhlo laka an fihlim loh chuan nakin lawka kan ram leh hnam tana hna ṭha tak tak thawk thei tur an vàn a hlauh thu sawiin ram leh hnam dam nân ṭhalai rilru leh taksa a hrisel a ngai thu a sawi. Kum hmasa lamah Siaha District in khawpui fai intihsiakna leh khawpui cheimawi inelnaah lawmman an la chu lawmawm a tih thu leh kum dangah pawh lawmman la thei tûra ṭan la sauh sauh tûrin kut hmangtu kal khawm zawng zawngte a sàwm bawk.

Siaha District chhunga mi hmingṭhate hnena hlan ṭhin 'Chawimawina Nopui' chu Prof. Chawngkhuma Chawngthu hnenah hlan niin, Chapchar Kût hmannaah hian mal zai, hnam lam leh hnam incheina hmuhnawm tâk entîr a ni a, fai inzirtirna neih bakah chanchinbu ṭha lawmman sem a ni bawk.

Chapchar kut Miss-ah Nl. Lara J. Zonunengi, New Siaha leh Mister Tv. Joseph Lallungmuana, New Colony thlan an ni a. Kût naa kal inchei nalh mipa puitlingah Pu Lalhmingliana, Siaha leh hmeichhe puitlingah Pi Lalmuanpuii, Siaha Vaihpi thlan an ni a, mipa naupang inchei nalhah Lalrawngbawla, Meisatla leh Hmeichhe naupangah Leona Ramhmachhuani, Siahatla thlan a ni bawk.

Kut thlengtu Pu N. Viakhu an lawmthu sawina a nei a, kham lo takin kum a ṭiak a ni.

title: AIZAWLAH CHAPCHAR KUT ROPUI TAKA LAWM A NI
content:
542/2025-2026

Aizawl the 13th March 2026: Chapchar Kut 2026 lawmna pui ber chu vawiin khan Aizawl lammualah hman a ni a, Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma chu Kut Pa niin Pu C. Lalsawivunga, Art & Culture Minister chu Kut thlengtu a ni a. Larsap Gen. Dr. VK Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM chuan a hmunah a telpui bawk. Kumina Chapchar Kut thupui atan "Zo nun ze mawi - Inremna" tih chu hman a ni.

Kumin Chapchar Kut hi hapta khat chhung hman a ni a, March ni 9, Thawntanni khan Kut Tlan hmanga bul tanin, Kut pual Handloom, Textile & Handicraft Exhibition and Food Processing and Food Court te, Flower Show te, Living Museum (Live demonstration of Mizo Typical Life) te, Photo, Painting Exhibition leh Chapchar Kut Film show te hapta khat chhung atana buatsaih zui niin vawiin hian a lawmna pui ber hi buatsaih a ni ta a ni.

Thu sawiin Kut Pa Pu Lalduhoma chuan, khawvel hmun hrang hranga awm zofate Kut chibai a buk a. Hlim taka hmang theuh turin duhsakna a hlan a ni. Chief Minister hian, kan pi leh pute khan Chapchar Kut hi hlim taka hman ngei an tum thin avangin tumah an inhau duh ngai lova, inremna hunah amang thin. Vawiina kan thupui "Zo nun ze mawi - Inremna" hi chapchar Kut nen a inhmeh em em a ni.

Inremna hi kan lal leh an upate pawh khan an ngaihlu a, ro an relna tinrengah "Chalrem" leh "Saui tan" dan hi thiam takin an hmang fo thin. Inremna atana thil pawimawh tak chu a mawhphurtu nih ngamna leh a tul anga thupha chawi ngamna hi a ni a. Kan thiam lohna leh fel lohnateah midang puhmawh lova 'Ka thiam loh a ni e, ka mawh a ni e' tih ngamna hian inremna te, damnate a thlen thin. He kut atang hian mawhphurhna la ngam turin i huaisen thar ang u.

Inremna a awm theih nan social media-a kan thu post leh comment te pawh hi i fimkhur ang u. Politics thila "Lim inhalsak" te hi kan hnamzia a ni lo. Rorelna hmunah tawngkain inkhak bawrh bawrh mah ila kan inhaw zui ngai reng reng lova. Inngeih takin kan inkawm zui leh mai thin. Inremna Kut kan hmang a ni tih hriain vawiin atang hian mi zawng zawngte inrem thar leh ang u, tiin mipuite a sawm a ni.Kut thlengtu Pu C. Lalsawivunga chuan thuhma a sawi a. Hlim taka hmang turin kal khawmte duhsakna a hlan a. Kut hlawhtling tak buatsaihtute zawng zawng chungah lawmthu a sawi a ni.Central YMA President Pu R. Lalngheta chuan kal khawmte lawmna thu a sawi a. Hnama min dintu Pathianin kan hnam tana ni ropui min buatsaihsak Chapchar Kut kan thleng leh thei hi a lawmawm a. He kut hi i uar deuh deuh ang u. Kut hlawhtling tak kan hman theih nana thawktute chungah te, Mizoram pawn atanga he hun hmang tura rawn kal zawng zawngte chungah te kan lawm em em a. Kan thupui "Inremna" nunpui a, Mizo hnam ti vul zel turin zofa zawng zawng te ka sawm a ni, a ti.Chapchar Kutah hian Chief Minister chawimawina Nopui semchhuah a ni a. A dawngtute chu:1. Esther Hnamte, Lunglei, Artist2. Lalhmingmawii, Chaltlang, Lemziak thiam, Award tam tak lo dawng tawhtu.3. Henry Lalhmingmuana, Lawngtlai 3, Rickshaw driver, a passenger-in a motora Rs 17 lakh a theihnghilh chu kim takin a pe leh a ni.4. Pu VL Bela, Electric Veng, Aizawl Zotheihuan siamtu, kum tam tak chhung nungcha humhalh zirtirtu.5. John Lalrinchhana Jahau, Khuangleng, Entreprenuer, te an ni.Nopui dawngtute hi pawisa fai Rs. 1,00,000 leh Citation pek an ni a. Kumin Chapchar Kut hi hetiang chawimawina Nopui pek chhuah tum khatna a ni.Fai intihsiakna lawmman te, Mizoram Bana Kaih hnuaia CM Special Award te pawh sem a ni a. Central YMA kaihhruaina hnuaiah Cheraw kanpui leh Khuallam entir a ni a. Pipu zai te, lam chi hrang hrang te, Mizo infiamna te, Thingdim lemchan te, Pawnto te entir a ni a. Pang Cultural Troupe ten Thla Koh an entir bakah NEZCC aiawh Meghalaya leh Sikkim Troupe ten an hnam lam an entir bawk.

title: Saitualah Chapchar Kut 2026 ropui taka lawm a ni
content:
4822/2025-2026

Saitual, the 13th March, 2026:Zofate kut ropui leh ngaihhlut hlawh ber te zinga mi Chapchar Kut 2026 chu Mizoram hmun dang te rualin Saitual Public Playground, Saitualah ropui taka lawm a ni a. Pu B. Lalchhanzova, Hon’ble Minister, Revenue, FCS&CA, IPR&PS, chu Kut Pa niin, District Bawrhsap Pu Srinivas Sadi chu Kut thlengtu a ni.

He hunah hian Kut Pa Pu B. Lalchhanzova chuan Zofate tana Kut pawimawh Chapchar Kut hmang tura kalkhawm zawng zawngte kut chibai a buk a, DC office lam te leh Saitual mipuiten tha taka an lo dawnsawn avangin lawmthu a sawi nghal a ni. Minister chuan kumin Chapchar Kut thupui atana thlan “Zonun ze mawi- Inremna” tih chu a pawimawh hle a ni, a ti a, inremna tel lo chuan khawtlang a kal thei lo a ni, a ti.

Pu B. Lalchhanzova chuan inremna awm tur chuan chhungkuaah bul tan a ngai tih a sawi a, chhungkua mai bakah thenawm khaw vengte, khawtlanga kan chenpuite, dan leh hrai kengkawhtute, sawrkar lam te leh NGO hrang hrang te nena inrem a, an thu te kan zawm thin a tul tih a sawi bawk. Kut Pa chuan hnam dangten sawrkar hna pawimawh an chelh chhoh mek zel tih sawiin, tha taka thawkho tur chuan hnam hrang hrang te nen pawha inremna tha neih a pawimawh a ni, a ti.

Minister chuan Mizo hnam chu hnam ropui a ni sa tih a sawi a, kan pi leh pu te tlawmngaihna, inremna, inunauna leh hawihhawmna te chu chhawm nung zel turin kalkhawmte chu a chah a ni. Chapchar Kut hlawhtling taka lawm a nih theih nana Saitual District mipui tha leh zung sengtu zawng zawngte chungah lawmthu sawiin, hlim taka Chapchar Kut hmang turin kalkhawmte chu a duhsakna a hlan bawk a ni.

Kut Thlengtu, District Bawrhsap Pu Srinivas Sadi chuan inlawmna thu sawiin, Saitual District-a Chapchar Kut hmang tura lo kal zawng zawng te leh Kut inbuatsaihnaa tha thawhtu zawng zawng te chungah lawmthu a sawi a. Bawrhsap chuan Kut thupui “ Zonun ze mawi- Inremna” tih chu hre reng a, tlawmngaihna leh hawihhawmna nunpui chhunzawm a, hlim taka Kut hmang turin kalkhawmte chu a sawm a ni.

Vawiin Kut hmannaah hian Saitual Town YMA Branch hrang hrang te leh YMA Sub-Hqrs Cultural Troop te atangin Cheraw Kanpui entir a ni a, Sub- Hrqs YMA Cultural Troop, YMA Saitual Town Branch leh cultural club dang ten Mizo hnam lam chi hrang hrang- Cheraw, Khuallam, Chheih lam leh Sarlamkai lam an entir a. MHIP Sub. Hqrs atangin Siktuithiang lam entir niin, YMA chhang te an pawnto bawk a ni. MUP Saitual District te chuan hlado an chham a, Govt. Saitual College atangin Mizo hnam thuam hrang hrang entirna kawngzawh “Costume Parade” neih niin, zai rimawi ngaihnawm tak tak te ngaihthlak a ni bawk.

Chapchar Kut 2026 lawmna huna kalte atangin Chapchar Kut Lanu atan Zaihmingthangi, Pawlrang chu thlan niin, Kut val atan Martin Lalruatfela, Keifang Venghlun chu thlan a ni bawk. Naupang kum 12 hnuai lam atangin Kut hraite thlan an ni a, hmeichhe naupang zingah Naom Zomuanpuii, Saitual Venglai chu thlan niin, mipa naupang zingah Reuben Malsawmzuala, Saitual Chhim Veng chu thlan a ni.

title: KOLASIBAH CHAPCHAR KUT 2026 ROPUI TAKA HMAN A NI
content:
4821/2025-2026

Dated Kolasib the 13th March 2026:Tukin khan Kolasib Sports Stadium ah Kolasiba Chapchar Kut 2026 lawmna chu ropui taka hman a ni a. He hunah hian Pu Lalfamkima Deputy Speaker, Mizoram Legislative Assembly chu Kut Pa niin, Pu Robert C Lalhmangaiha, Kolasib Bawrhsap chu Kut thlengtu a ni.

Kut Pa, Pu Lalfamkima chuan mipui kalkhawmte hnenah Chapchar Kut chibai bukin, he kut hi Mizo te zinga kut ropui ber a nih thu a sawi a. Chapchar Kut tobul tarlangin, kum 1400 AD vel khan Seipui khua atanga hman tan a nih thu a sawi . Kumin Chapchar Kut thupui, 'Zonun Zemawi - Inremna' tih chu thupui tha tak a nih thu sawiin, "Kan inremna leh tlawmngaihna hian hnam angin min ti phuisui a, khawhar chhungte tan pawh thlamuanna thlentu a ni. Pachhia leh thawkmawh zawkte kan inpuihbawm tawnna te hi Zonun zemawi dik tak chu a ni," a ti.

Kut Pa chuan Kan thlahtute nuna inlungrualna awm thinte tarlangin, "Kan pi leh pute kha chu a thlum a al ei za, inlungrual taka khawsa thin an ni a. Tunlaiah erawh chhungkaw ro inchuh vanga thih ngam khawpa innghirnghona te kan zingah a tam ta hi a pawi hle a ni. Hnam inpumkhatna aia politics-ah te inchirhthehna a hluar ta lutuk te hi siamthat kan ngai a ni," tiin mipuite a chah.

Zonun zemawi chhawm nung a, vawng nung zel turin kalkhawmte a chah a. Kumin Chapchar Kut thupui hian Mizo mipuite zingah inremna, tlawmngaihna leh inhmangaih tawnna rawn thlen thar leh se tiin duhsakna a hlan a ni. Zoram mipuite chu inpumkhat tura mawhphurhna lian tak kan nei tih hriain, mimal leh chhungkuaah pawh Lal Isua Krista hnungzuiin inrem taka awm ho turin a chah bawk.

Vawiin Kolasiba Chapchar kut hmanna ah hian Mizo hnam lam chi hrang hrang; Cheraw kan, Par lam, Sarlamkai, Chheih lam leh Tlanglam te entir a ni a. Hnam lam bakah hian zai mawi tak tak MZI Kolasib member te leh Bzi Tochhawng leh Vanlalhlana te atangin ngaihthlak a ni bawk. Heng bakah hian MUP in Hlado chham na hun an hmang bawk a ni.

Kolasiba Chapchar kut 2026 hmanna hunah hian mipui thahnem tak an kalkhawm a. Amaherawhchu chawhnu herah ruah nasa taka a sur avangin Chapchar Kut lawmna hun hi Pu Robert C Lalhmangaiha, Kolasib Bawrhsap chuan a khar a ni.

title: MAMIT-AH CHAPCHAR KUT ROPUI TAKA HMAN A NI
content:
4820/2025-2026

Dated : Mamit the 13th of March, 2026 :Vawiin khan Tennis Court, Mangkhawngdai, Mamit-ah Chapchar Kut 2026 hlim leh ropui taka hman a ni a,Kut pa Pu Malsawmzuala, Project Director, DRDO niin Kut thlengtu hi Pu Vanlalchhuanga Chhangte, President Sub-Hqrs YMA a ni.

Kut Pa Pu Malsawmzuala chuan Pathianin mizo ni tura min siam angin hetah hian kan lungawi tur a ni a, hnam lian zawk leh ropui zawkte kan ngaisangin kan zah thei a mahse indah hniam loin Mizo kan nihna a tidanglam tur a nilo a ti. Mizote min ti Mizo tu zinga kan incheina hi a ni a, kan kut leh hun ropuiah te kan hain kan mawipui hle thin a, hei bakah hian kan tawng hi kan hnam min phuarkhawmtu a ni a, Mizoram anga ram chhunga cheng te'n tawngkhat an hmanna hi khawvel ang pawhin a tamlo a , tawng dang kan thiam hle a nih pawhin kan tawng hi kan hnualsuat a thianglo a, kan chawinung zel tur a ni tiin Zofa hmun hrang hranga chengte pawh kan tawng Mizo tawng hian min phuar khawm zel rawh se a ti.

Kut Pa hian kan hnam hian chimral maite kan hlau thin a, mihring tamah kan chhehvela ram leh hnamte kan tluklo hle a, tluk theihna kan neih Aia upa zahna, taimakna, rinawmna leh finna hmangin kan ram leh hnam hi dinhmun tha tak ah kan dah zel thei a ni tiin kan ram neih chhun duatna chang hriaa inrem taka khawsa zel turin kalkhawmte a sawm a ni.

Kut thlengtu Pu Vanlalchhunga Chhangte pawhin thusawiin kut hmang tura kalkhawm mipuite, kut hlawhtling taka hman a nih theih nana thawktu zawng zawngte chungah lawmthu sawiin kut thupui Zo nun ze mawi, inremna vawng nung chunga hlim taka kut hmang turin a chah bawk a ni.

Vawiin Chapchar kut hmanna hunah hian Mamit khawpui chhunga YMA Branch hrang hrang te'n cheraw kan pui an entir a, mizo hnam lam chi hrang hrangte YMA Branch hrang hrangte bakah MHIP, MCO atang te'n an entir bakah zaithiam te'n zaiin mipui an awi a ni.

Vawiin Chapchar kut hmanna hi Mamit khawpui chhung bakah District chhung leh pawn atangin zaithiamte an tel a ni.

title: 'Zo nun Ze mawi Inremna' tih thupui hmangin Chapchar Kut 2026 chu Hnahthial-ah ropui taka hman a ni
content:
4819/2025-2026

Dated Hnahthial, the 13th March, 2026:'Zo nun Ze mawi Inremna' tih thupui nei Chapchar Kut, 2026 chu vawiin khan Hnahthialah pawh Pasaltha Mual, Denlung-ah ropui taka hman a ni a. South Tuipui bialtu MLA, Pu Jeje Lalpekhlua chu Kut pa niin Pi K. Vanlalruati, District Bawrhsap chu Kut Thlengtu a ni.

Kut Pa, South Tuipui bialtu MLA, Pu Jeje Lalpekhlua chuan thu sawiin vawiina Mizo te kut ngaihhlut tak Chapchar Kut hmang theia kan awm hi a lawmawm a tiin a ngaihhlut thu a sawi a. Kumin kut thupui, 'Zo nun Ze mawi, Inremna' tih hi kan thinlungah kan vawn reng a tul thu sawiin Mizo te hi mi tha tak tak vek niin Mizo nih hi tinuamtu pakhat a nih thu a sawi a. Tlawmngai hnam, aia upa zah tu, mi harsa khaichhuak thin hnam kan nih thu sawiin vawiina kan kut thupui hi kan vawn nun reng a tul thu a sawi.

Hnahthial District pawhin hmasawnna nasa tak kan nei chho mek zel thu sawiin Sustainable Development Goals tehna hrang hrang a siamah India ram puma pakhatna dinhmun kan hauh thei te hi a hlut takzet thu a sawi a. Kut Pa chuan tun hnaiah Hnahthial District atangin MCS tling thar 2 bakah zirtirtu tha chawimawi tlak kan nei te hi a hlu hle a ni tiin MCS tling tur te, Zirtirtu tha ni tur te hian theih tawp an chhuah ang tih a chian thu a sawi a. Vawiina lo kalkhawm, a bik takin zirlaite leh naupang zawk te hian kan thiltihna kawng hrang hrangah theih tawp kan chhuah a tul a ni tih hre thar leh i la, Mizoram mai ni lo, India huapah pawh kan lang thei ngei ang a ti bawk.

He hunah Chapchar Organizing Chairman Pu HD. Lalpekmawia chuan inlawmna thu sawiin Kut thlengtu, District Bawhrsap, Pi K. Vanlalruati pawhin thu a sawi a. Zaipawl, mal zai leh hnam lam chi hrang hrang entirna neih niin Kut Nula, Kut Tlangval leh Kut Mipa Naupang leh Kut hmeichhe naupang thlan an ni bawk.

Chawhnu lam programme-ah Zai Kutpui hman niin ziami ten mipui an awi a ni.

title: Adviser to CM Pu TBC Lalvenchhunga'n Champhai Chapchar Kut hmanpui
content:
4818/2025-2026

Champhai, dated 13th March 2026:Adviser to Chief Minister (Finance & Planning) Pu TBC Lalvenchhunga chuab vawiina Zotlang Sports Stadium, Champhai Chapchar Kut 2026 lawmna chu Kut Pa niin a hmanpui a, Champhai Bawrhsap Pu Mohammad Aaquib chu Kut Thlengtu niin "Zo Nun Ze Mawi - Inremna" tih thupui hman a ni.

Kut Pa Pu TBC Lalvenchhunga chuan thu sawiin mahni khua ngeia he Chapchar Kut hun hlu tak hmang tura an sawm avangin buatsaihtute chungah lawmthu a sawi a. Zonun ze mawi inremna tih thupui hi pawimawh tak a ni a, kan hnam zia hian Mizo kan nihna a tichiang em em a ni tih a sawi a. Kan ze mawi, heng - tlawmngaihna, inremna leh thuawihna te hi hnam dangin min ngaihsanna a ni a, hnam anga kan ropuina tilangtu a ni tih a sawi. Chuvang chuan Zo nun ze mawi hi vawiin kalkhawmte'n kan hlut zel a pawimawh a, chhawm nung reng turin an sawm a. Thangtharte leh thalaite hnena hriatna hlanchhawn kawnga thawk tha em em YMA leh MUP te he kawngah hian an hlu leh zual a, an thawh thatna chu fakin zirtir chhunzawm zel turin a chah bawk. Inremna hian awmze tam tak a nei a, a awmzia pawimawh ber chu boruak tha lo siamtha tura mihring leh mihring inkara inremna hi a ni tih a sawi a. Inremlohna hi Zonun ze mawia tel lo - chapona te, inhriatthiam lohna te, dawhtheihna neih loh te leh inngaihdam theih loh te hi kalkhawm mipui chuan do tlat turin a chah a, Champhai hian tourist a hip nasat zel avangin khual chhawn thiam te zir zel a tul chho dawn tih sawiin dawhtheihna leh ngaihdam theihna nei zel turin a chah a. He Zonun ze mawi hi kan chhawm nun zel chuan Champhai hi district entawn tlak a ni thei tih sawiin hun hlimawm tak hmang turin duhsakna a hlan a ni.

He hunah hian Kut Thlengtu Pu Mohammad Aaquib chuan inlawmna thu a sawi a, District MUP-in hlado an chham a. Intihhlimna chi hrang hrang awmin Mizo hnam lam chi hrang hrang YMA Branch te leh MHIP te'n an pho chhuak a, zai ngaihnawm tak tak zaithiam milar leh Champhai MZI atang te'n ngaihthlak a ni bawk. Mizo incheina mawi tak tak hmuh tur awmin a inchei nalh ber te hnenah lawmman sem a ni a, lawmman dawngtute chu hetiang hi an ni:

Hmeichhia - Ruthi Lalruatsangi, Champhai Vengsang

title: Serchhipah Chapchar Kut 2026 lawm
content:
4817/2025-2026

Dated Serchhip, the 13th March, 2026:Vawiin khan Serchhip Leisekawt Mualah Chapchar Kut, 2026 hlim taka hman a ni a. Rural Development Minister Prof Lalnilawma chu Kut Pa niin DC Pu Paul L Khuma chu Kut Thlengtu a ni.

Kut Pa Prof Lalnilawma chuan Mizote kut zinga ropui ber Chapchar Kut hmang tura kalkhawmte chibai bukin hlim taka hmang turin duhsakna a hlan a. Chapchar Kut hi zo nun ze mai chawisanna a nih bakah Mizo culture, mizo thuam, hnam lam leh zai te chawi nunna hun remchang a ni, a ti. Minister chuan kumin Chapchar Kut thupui Zo Nun Ze Mawi - Inremna chu a sawia sawi aiin a taka nunpui tur a ni, a ti a. Ram leh khawtlang hmasawnna tura hma an laknaah pawl hrang hrang te inrem tur te, policy hrang mahse political party te pawh inrem tur leh doctrine in ang lo nei kohhran hrang hrang te pawh inrem turin a sawm a. Serchhip chu ziak leh chhiar thiam tamna District an nih angin zirna uar turin a sawm bawk a ni.

Kut Thlengtu DC Pu Paul L Khuma chuan kumin Chapchar Kut thupui Zo Nun Ze Mawi - Inremna a nih ang ngeiin huatna aiah hmangaihna, rinhlelhna aiah rinna, manganna aia lh beiseina, thinrimna aiah lungawina, thim aiah eng, innghirnghona aiah inremna kan zavaia kan neih theih nan an rilru te buatsaih turin a fuih a. Hlim taka Chapchar Kut hmang turin kalkhawmte a sawm a ni.

Hun khatna, Additional DC Pu Lalrinzuala, Chapchar Kut Working Chairman kaihhruaiah hian Mizo hnam lam leh zai chi hrang hrang en leh ngaihthlak a ni. Serchhip Town Branch YMA ten Cheraw kanpui an entir a. Sub MHIP Sub Headquarters YMA Cultural Troupe, Govt Serchhip College Phunchawng Cultural Club, MHIP Sub Headquarters leh YMA Chhang ten hnam lam chi hrang hrang mawi tak tak an entir a. Mal zai leh zaipawl zai ngaihthlak tur a awm bakah Govt Serchhip College ten Mizo hnam inthuamin fashion show leh lemchan tawi hmuhnawm tak an entir a. Chapchar Kut chhimtu zawng zawng te hlim takin an Chai ho a ni.

Chapchar Kut lawmnaah hian Miss Chapchar Kut 2026 atan Lalhlupuii Chhangte, Kawnpui North chu thlan a ni.

Hun hnihnaah hian concert neih a ni a. Aizawl atanga zaithiam lo kal bakah Serchhip MZI leh MDM member zaithiam tak tak ten mipui kalkhawmte an awi a ni.

Chapchar Kut 2026 Leisekawt Muala neih chhung hian Mizo Thang chi hrang hrang 14 - thangthleng, thangpui, vaithang, beai, khaileng, sahdal, thangchep, kar, fal, mangkhawng, hnawhtawt, kawlper, vawm tlak leh aiawt te chu mipuite entheih turin pho chhuah a ni a. Mual sirah Commerce & Industries buatsaihin stall chi hrang hrang 10 hawn a ni bawk a. CM Special Package dawngtu 3, PMVK beneficiary 1 bakah khawtual mi thiamhnang deh lam thiam 6 ten mipuite lei theih turin dawr an hawng a ni.
